title: Citadel drops U.S. Portofino suit, seeks bankruptcy order against firm's founder in UK
summary: After winning a 6 million-pound London arbitration award, Citadel dropped its U.S. trade secrets case, saying another judgment would likely go uncollected.

title: SpaceX's first bitcoin wallet movements in six months likely don't signal sales
summary: Onchain trackers found the newly public company shifted a tiny amount of bitcoin between its own addresses. Nothing reached an exchange.

title: Bitcoin's inflation quagmire gets stickier as renewed MidEast conflict sends oil price soaring
Crypto and stocks tumble after Trump declares ceasefire 'over' following Iran strikes
summary: Bitcoin fell, altcoins slid after Trump said the ceasefire with Iran is "over" as U.S. and Iran traded airstrikes.

title: Reserve Bank of India still favors crypto prohibition to curtail tax evasion: Reuters
summary: Indian regulators maintained a hawkish stance despite the growing embrace of digital assets and technology by governments worldwide.
